description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a minimalist rectangular layout and a flat roof. The structure features large glass panels along the main facade, likely providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. A spacious swimming pool is integrated into the front yard, bordered by a wide patio area and a secondary, smaller flat-roofed structure, possibly a pool house or garage. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with prominent use of concrete or stone and metal for the roof. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong horizontal orientation. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on functionality and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass panels, and an integrated swimming pool. The design features clean lines, light materials, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house, large pool, and adjacent flat-roofed structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area and the depth of the main building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long, horizontal layout and secondary structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool and the entry area.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, wide steps, and large glass doors
